name: Grade 12 Learning Commons — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 12 pathway for capstone inquiry, portfolio-quality work, and college/career-ready public communication through Learning Commons. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 12 knowledge and transferable skills in capstone inquiry, portfolio-quality work, and college/career-ready public communication through Learning Commons.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.title: Launch inquiry: capstone inquiry, portfolio-quality work, and college/career-ready public communication through Learning Commons
lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about capstone inquiry, portfolio-quality work, and college/career-ready public communication through Learning Commons and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.

I can use appropriate disciplinary vocabulary, evidence, and tools to communicate my reasoning.

activities.title: Question and evidence
activities.learnerAction: The learner develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about capstone inquiry, portfolio-quality work, and college/career-ready public communication through Learning Commons, documents evidence in an age-appropriate format, and follows applicable safety, ethics, and collaboration expectations.

successCriteria: The learner completes a grade 12 task connected to capstone inquiry, portfolio-quality work, and college/career-ready public communication through Learning Commons.
